themes.name: [Negative] App Freezes, Technical Issues, Poor Support

quotes.text: my account balance showed negative balance.
The Auto-Square off didn't work and the intraday trade was dragged beyond 3:20 Auto-Square off time. Many Transactions look shady due to Discrepancies.

themes.description: Users reported frequent app crashes, technical issues, delays, and poor customer support leading to financial losses, lost opportunities, and frustration with the Groww platform.
themes.business_impact: Substantial financial losses, customer dissatisfaction, potential revenue loss, damage to brand reputation
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Outdated and inefficient backend infrastructure, inadequate load testing, and insufficient training for customer support executives
themes.action_plan:
• Upgrade the backend infrastructure, conduct thorough load testing, retrain customer support executives, implement robust error handling and real-time issue resolution mechanisms
• Enhance the user onboarding experience and provide clear, concise instructions to reduce technical issues
• Develop a comprehensive knowledge base for FAQs and provide transparent information on technical issues and resolution timelines

themes.name: [Negative] Slow App Performance
themes.description: Users experience frequent app crashes, slow loading times, and freezing, which severely impacts their ability to use the app effectively.
themes.business_impact: High user frustration leading to negative word-of-mouth and potential long-term churn risk.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient optimization of app functionality for multiple devices and network conditions, combined with potential performance bottlenecks in the underlying architecture.
themes.action_plan: • Improve app performance by optimizing UI, leveraging caching and background processing, and monitoring network requests. Identify and address potential bottlenecks in the architecture, and prioritize features to minimize impact on app performance.
